description: User who journals about running and asks about fitness goals

memory_chunks.content: Ran 5 miles this morning before work. Felt great — best time yet at 42 minutes. I want to work up to a 10K by the end of the year.
Skipped my run today because of the rain. Feeling guilty. I need to be more consistent if I want to hit my marathon goal.
Signed up for the local 5K race next month. Nervous but excited. Training plan says I need to add interval sprints twice a week.
My knee has been bothering me after long runs. Going to rest for a few days and then ease back in. Don't want to injure myself before the race.

query: What are my fitness goals and how is my running progress going?
